jobs.name: Dataset · PID 2571758
command: /usr/bin/bash -lic set +m; set -euo pipefail export PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1 logdir=/tmp/ucore-regen-$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S) mkdir -p "$logdir" for npc in history_guide chef_assistant astronomy_guide fitness_coach; do   echo "=== $npc ===" | tee -a "$logdir/summary.log"   stdbuf -oL -eL ./ucore generate-ollama "subjects/NPC_specs/${npc}.json" --model llama3.1-3060-chat:latest 2>&1 | tee "$logdir/${npc}.log"   echo "---" | tee -a "$logdir/summary.log" done printf '\nLogs: %s\n' "$logdir"

jobs.name: Export · PID 2558831
command: /usr/bin/bash -lic set +m; set -euo pipefail export PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1 export OLLAMA_NUM_PARALLEL=4 export OLLAMA_FLASH_ATTENTION=1 export OLLAMA_KV_CACHE_TYPE=q8_0 logdir=/tmp/ucore-deepeval-$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S) mkdir -p "$logdir" for npc in history_guide chef_assistant astronomy_guide fitness_coach; do   echo "=== $npc ===" | tee -a "$logdir/summary.log"   stdbuf -oL -eL ./ucore dataset-eval "subjects/NPC_specs/${npc}.json" --technique ollama --judge-model qwen3:latest --cases-per-category 5 --soft-fail 2>&1 | tee "$logdir/${npc}.log"   echo "---" | tee -a "$logdir/summary.log" done printf '\nLogs: %s\n' "$logdir"
